testcase.name: test_member_login

failure.message: AssertionError: Login response should contain 'token' assert 'token' in {'access_token': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJkaXBhbGlAY2x1YmNvbmNpZXJnZS5pbiIsInJvbGUiOiJ1c2VyIiwiZXhwIjoxNzcwMTg3MDQ4fQ.XxRupVnomCBSPW2PKNxJ4WzFS-iiLPrete57MTV_dnc', 'message': 'Login successful', 'mira_access': {'allowed': True, 'limit': 3, 'message': None, 'priority': False, ...}, 'token_type': 'bearer', ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_100_features.py:194: in test_member_login assert "token" in data, "Login response should contain 'token'" E AssertionError: Login response should contain 'token' E assert 'token' in {'access_token': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJkaXBhbGlAY2x1YmNvbmNpZXJnZS5pbiIsInJvbGUiOiJ1c2VyIiwiZXhwIjoxNzcwMTg3MDQ4fQ.XxRupVnomCBSPW2PKNxJ4WzFS-iiLPrete57MTV_dnc', 'message': 'Login successful', 'mira_access': {'allowed': True, 'limit': 3, 'message': None, 'priority': False, ...}, 'token_type': 'bearer', ...}

testcase.name: test_member_pets_endpoint
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_100_features.py:212: in test_member_pets_endpoint token = login_response.json()["token"] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'token'
